goal: Make mornings the most productive time

Adopt a CBT-I–style approach for 4–8 weeks with a sleep diary to track changes; start with consistent wake time, wind-down, bed only for sleep/sex, get up if awake >20 minutes, limit naps, consider sleep restriction as needed, morning bright light, relaxation techniques.
